title: azudems questions
wikitext:
[]: azudem's questions             Quote Post by azudem » Fri Mar 24, 2023 2:26 am In episode 9 we see (probably the only time) Toji not in his black clothes. But when the friends walks in the corridor, Toji's clothes is black again. Is this just an animation mistake?

[]: Is this long-haired women is Yui?             Quote Post by azudem » Fri Mar 24, 2023 2:31 am

[]: Yui's clothes changes             Quote Post by azudem » Fri Mar 24, 2023 8:14 am What's the point of different clothes on Yui at the same scene?

[]: Re: Yui's clothes changes             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Mar 24, 2023 12:37 pm The Touji thing seems like a genuine mistake. The Yui thing however I think is meant to add to the dream like nature of Instrumentality, with Yui changing between appearances she's had. We've seen something similar in the franchise with other characters. Almost like the character contains all their past at once or something. Yui is the long hair woman, yeah. Or at least it's strongly implied. Her soul inside Eva-01.

[]: Re: azudem's outfit questions             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Mar 24, 2023 12:42 pm Merged these threads into one; in order - 1) animation error 2) Given that this is either Leliel or EoE, that would be Yui, yes 3) Yui is not physically there, this is Gendo hallucinating, so the inconsistencies are likely intentional EDIT: Oops, kuribo did it first and better

[]: Re: azudem's outfit questions             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Fri Mar 24, 2023 4:15 pm The next thing that happens after Yui's clothes change color is Gendo gets chomped by Unit-01, which has Yui's soul. The change represents Yui assuming Unit-01's color scheme as the transformation takes place. This is just how Gendo gets taken into Instrumentality rather than seeing a Rei clone and is not an hallucination. https://wiki.evageeks.org/File:M26_C356_b_mid.jpg

[]: Re: Yui's clothes changes             Quote Post by azudem » Sat Mar 25, 2023 10:20 am kuribo-04 wrote: The Touji thing seems like a genuine mistake.

[]: Re: Yui's clothes changes             Quote Post by MsenjaKagami » Sat Mar 25, 2023 10:58 am But why Toji wears not his black outfit in this scene in the first place? Correct me if I wrong, but I believe it's the only time he wear school's standard white/cyan outfit.

[]: Misato's cross changed in EoE             Quote Post by azudem » Sat Mar 25, 2023 5:52 pm It seems commonly known that Misato's cross have changed from TV to EoE, namely the hole for the rope became frontal in EoE. And the common interpretation is too fit with the final scene (it's hard to nail it to the grave if hole is through the sides). But I noticed that in EoE the hole is through the sides too, until the scene where Misato gives the cross to Shinji. Starting from this scene, the hole is frontal and never changed up to the final scene. It seems somewhat contradict with the mentioned interpretation. What do you think?

[]: Re: Misato's cross changed in EoE             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Mar 25, 2023 6:17 pm I never noticed! I think the explanation still applies. It could have been a change made mid production? And they didn't bother correcting shots that were animated.

[]: What the point of killing angels?             Quote Post by azudem » Sun Mar 26, 2023 4:16 pm The human instrumentality project, as far as I understand, follows from a contact of two angels. Resulting anti-AT field will destroy all AT-fields of the earth life and the souls will unite. Angels also wants to contact with either Adam or Lilith. If so, what the point of killing angels, if the human instrumentality project is the goal anyway? Just let's them contact!

[]: Re: What the point of killing angels?             Quote Post by Archer » Sun Mar 26, 2023 4:45 pm The implication is that Angels contacting Adam will simply wipe out all Lilith-based life on Earth and replace it with their own.

[]: Re: azudem's questions             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Mar 27, 2023 2:18 pm azudem, please stop making a new thread for every single question you have; just use this one

[]: Re: azudem's questions             Quote Post by azudem » Mon Mar 27, 2023 2:23 pm Sorry, I though "topic" is literally a topic.

[]: Re: azudem's outfit questions             Quote Post by nerv bae » Thu Mar 30, 2023 11:36 am thewayneiac wrote: The next thing that happens after Yui's clothes change color is Gendo gets chomped by Unit-01, which has Yui's soul. The change represents Yui assuming Unit-01's color scheme as the transformation takes place. ...

[]: Re: azudem's questions             Quote Post by azudem » Wed Apr 05, 2023 9:43 am Some findings: 1. Asuka and Rei never calls each other by name or surname. Whenever Asuka can't use a pronoun, she calls Rei by some sarcastic nickname. 2. Pen-Pen is a smart animal. It's kind of fun and cute when he opens a refrigerator. But... wait, WTF, he's reading newspaper?! 3. Misato's car suddenly became red (episode 7 and 23)?

[]: Re: azudem's questions             Quote Post by DTGee » Thu Apr 13, 2023 12:16 pm azudem wrote: 3. Misato's car suddenly became red (episode 7 and 23)?

[]: Re: azudem's questions             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Apr 13, 2023 2:29 pm No, that one is empirically not the case; we hear her complain about car loans, she wouldn't be able to afford more than one

[]: Re: azudem's questions             Quote Post by AsukaisLiterallyMe » Thu Apr 13, 2023 7:49 pm That always bothered me, Misato's money problems. Like, is she that bad at finances on what must be an astronomical salary? Nerv is not part of the government per se, so you'd think they wouldn't be running on local government pay scales and whatnot.

[]: Re: azudem's questions             Quote Post by DTGee » Thu Apr 13, 2023 8:50 pm Blockio wrote: No, that one is empirically not the case; we hear her complain about car loans, she wouldn't be able to afford more than one
